  :PROPERTIES:

  :END:

  DEADLINE: <2026-05-01 Fri 09:00>
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: ts-006
  :END:

* Repeater catch-up
  SCHEDULED: <2026-04-01 Wed ++2d>
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: ts-007
  :END:

* Repeater restart
  SCHEDULED: <2026-04-01 Wed .+1m>
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: ts-008
  :END:

* Bare created no dow
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: ts-009
  :CREATED: 2026-06-01
  :END:

* Bare created with time and dow
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: ts-010
  :CREATED: 2026-06-15 Sun 08:45
  :END:

* Malformed created
  :PROPERTIES:
  :ID: ts-011
  :CREATED: sometime in March
  :END:
